prompt: Create a cinematic football legend poster designed as a layered double-exposure portrait on a textured off-white paper background. The overall composition is a large side-profile silhouette of Erling Haaland, facing right, with the interior of the silhouette filled with a dramatic Nordic football journey montage. Keep the outer head shape realistic, with windswept long blond hair sweeping across the top and back, and a visible ear at the far right edge. Inside the silhouette, build a moody storm-soaked narrative scene in deep navy, charcoal, steel blue, cold gray, and muted gold. At the top of the silhouette, place a rugged mountain landscape under turbulent clouds, a small coastal village with warm lights, and 1 footballer seen from behind standing near a pitch-side area; include a visible sign that reads BRYNE. In the upper-middle area, add 2 figures from a memory scene, an older man with an arm around a child, both seen from behind in mist and rain. Nearby, add 1 smaller action figure in a red football kit running forward in celebration. In the middle-right, place 1 larger action figure in a yellow football kit, sprinting intensely through rain and sparks. Across the central band, incorporate 1 tactical-analysis strip with drawn arrows, circles, dashed passing lines, and small player markers, plus tiny technical text overlays such as sprint speed and top speed values, giving a data-driven elite-athlete feel. In the lower-middle foreground, feature the main hero figure in a dark almost-black football kit, long blond hair tied back, charging diagonally toward the viewer with explosive motion and wet, reflective fabric. Behind him, show a packed stadium with bright floodlights and heavy atmosphere. At the lower-right, depict 1 goalkeeper diving and 1 football blasting into the goal with a bright motion trail. Add subtle rain, mist, embers, spray, and ink-like watercolor edges around the silhouette so the image bleeds organically into the paper. At the bottom center, place an elegant gold serif title in large capital letters reading THE MACHINE FROM THE NORTH, and beneath it a small refined subtitle reading Built In Rain, Finished In Silence. The style should feel like an epic sports biopic poster, hyper-detailed, emotional, atmospheric, dramatic lighting, high contrast, painterly photorealism, premium fan-edit aesthetic, cinematic depth, sharp focal subjects, and a mythic Scandinavian tone.
